seoTitle: Derriwong vs Deua — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Derriwong and Deua. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Derriwong and Deua.
heading: Derriwong vs Deua — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Derriwong, New South Wales and Deua, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Deua has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Derriwong (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Derriwong or Deua safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Derriwong has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Deua scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Derriwong scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Deua scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Derriwong or Deua?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Deua has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
